payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark brown wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped tall, dark brown stained wooden cabinet door panel with a recessed central panel and raised outer frame; vertical wood grain and a matte finish are visible, no hardware is shown, and there is slight wear near the bottom — photographed close-up (approx. 0.5 m).
